raw_consumer_statement:
Barclays credit card had two charges on my statement that I did not do. They did three fraud investigations that resulted in not fraud because my card was inserted into a reader within two different states : XXXX XXXX in North Carolina, on XX/XX/25, {$12.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXXXXXX in PA on XX/XX/25, {$230.00} I live in New York State and do not travel. I was not in XXXX XXXX  or XXXX  on XX/XX/. 

I am the only one who had the card. Im refusing to pay for these charges that I didnt do, and company will not work with me
